stages.title: Site Layout
stages.narration: Stage 1. Site Layout. Site layout establishes grid, drainage and load zones before excavation.
stages.explanation: Site layout establishes grid, drainage and load zones before excavation.
stages.engineeringPrinciple: Site layout establishes grid, drainage and load zones before excavation.
stages.inspectionChecklist: Verify setbacks, north orientation and surface runoff paths.

stages.title: Excavation
stages.narration: Stage 2. Excavation. Excavation reaches competent bearing stratum for safe load transfer.
stages.explanation: Excavation reaches competent bearing stratum for safe load transfer.
stages.engineeringPrinciple: Excavation reaches competent bearing stratum for safe load transfer.
stages.inspectionChecklist: Check trench depth, soil class and dewatering if required.

stages.title: Foundation
stages.narration: Stage 3. Foundation. Foundation spreads loads to soil through footings and plinth continuity.
stages.explanation: Foundation spreads loads to soil through footings and plinth continuity.
stages.engineeringPrinciple: Foundation spreads loads to soil through footings and plinth continuity.
stages.inspectionChecklist: Inspect rebar cover, concrete grade and plinth beam continuity.

stages.title: Structural Frame
stages.narration: Stage 4. Structural Frame. Primary structural frame defines load paths for roof and walls.
stages.explanation: Primary structural frame defines load paths for roof and walls.
stages.engineeringPrinciple: Primary structural frame defines load paths for roof and walls.
stages.inspectionChecklist: Confirm verticality, connections and temporary bracing.

stages.title: Walls
stages.narration: Stage 5. Walls. Wall systems enclose the structure and transfer lateral loads.
stages.explanation: Wall systems enclose the structure and transfer lateral loads.
stages.engineeringPrinciple: Wall systems enclose the structure and transfer lateral loads.
stages.inspectionChecklist: Check interlocking, grout cells and vertical reinforcement.

stages.title: Lintel & Roof Bands
stages.narration: Stage 6. Lintel & Roof Bands. RC bands tie walls for seismic box action.
stages.explanation: RC bands tie walls for seismic box action.
stages.engineeringPrinciple: RC bands tie walls for seismic box action.
stages.inspectionChecklist: Continuous pour; no gaps at corners.

stages.title: Roof
stages.narration: Stage 7. Roof. Roof diaphragm distributes gravity and seismic loads to walls.
stages.explanation: Roof diaphragm distributes gravity and seismic loads to walls.
stages.engineeringPrinciple: Roof diaphragm distributes gravity and seismic loads to walls.
stages.inspectionChecklist: Curing, formwork removal sequence, anchor bolts.

stages.title: Completed Structure
stages.narration: Stage 8. Completed Structure. Completed resilient house ready for services and occupancy.
stages.explanation: Completed resilient house ready for services and occupancy.
stages.engineeringPrinciple: Completed resilient house ready for services and occupancy.
stages.inspectionChecklist: Final waterproofing, openings, and quality checklist.

earthquake.title: Earthquake Simulation
earthquake.explanation: Structural frame and bands redistribute inertia forces; flexible connections limit damage.

wind.title: Wind Simulation
wind.explanation: Roof anchorage and wall ties resist uplift and racking.
